did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses traditional image processing algorithms (Otsu thresholding, morphological operations, bottom-hat filter) and a rule-based classification system (ABCD rule and Total Dermatoscopy Score) for melanoma identification. It does not employ machine learning, deep learning, or AI models to obtain its results, although it mentions neural networks only in the context of related work and future improvements.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
